title: Midnight Korean Paneer Jjigae
description: A spicy and savory Korean-inspired cheese stew to satisfy your midnight cravings. This dish is a fusion of Korean jjigae and Indian paneer, perfect for a late-night snack.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add ginger and garlic and cook for another minute.
Add gochujang, gochugaru, soy sauce, and sambal oelek. Stir well to combine.
Add paneer and cook until it starts to melt, about 2-3 minutes.
Stir in chopped scallions and cook for another minute.
Serve the jjigae hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
